label: juggle_pairs_rally
note: SUPERSEDED / DOES NOT SATISFY THE HARD RULE. This run pairs gate 2 (bounce t=2.01 -> window t=2.66, lag 0.65s) but NEVER threads gate 1's window, so under the hard rule (credit is a strict gate-1-anchored chain of bounce+window pairs) it scores CHAIN=0. Kept for contrast only. It is still strictly better-behaved than policy_v230 (raw 25), which flings the ball over all 4 gates, lets it settle at 3.61s, then flies BACKWARDS through the windows at 4.87/6.67/7.88 - that also scores CHAIN=0.
